title: Sum and Average of Fixed Scores
prompt_md:
## Goal
Read exactly 5 integers into a fixed-size `std::array`, then report their sum and average.

## Input
A single line containing exactly 5 space-separated integers.

## Output
- Line 1: the sum of the 5 integers.
- Line 2: the average as a `double`, printed with exactly one digit after the decimal point.

## Example
Input `10 20 30 40 50` produces:
```
150
30.0
```

title: Count Elements Above Threshold
prompt_md:
## Goal
Read 6 temperatures into a fixed-size `std::array` and a threshold, then report how many temperatures strictly exceed the threshold and list them.

## Input
- Line 1: exactly 6 space-separated integers (the temperatures).
- Line 2: a single integer (the threshold).

## Output
- Line 1: the count of temperatures strictly greater than the threshold.
- Following lines: each exceeding temperature on its own line, in original order.

If none exceed the threshold, print only the count `0`.

## Example
Input `30 25 35 28 40 22` then `29` produces:
```
3
30
35
40
```

test_cases.label: Hidden -- all above threshold with negatives
